name: ASUS ROG STRIX Z590-F GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel Z590 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DP 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - WiFi 6 (802.11ax)
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX Z590-F GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200
description: Premium ATX gaming motherboard for Intel 10th gen with Z590 chipset, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6 support.
